content: Desdemona kneels in defeat against the ruined altar, hands bound behind her back by Cait, her tight leather bodysuit torn to reveal pale skin beneath. MJR looms nearby, casually cleaning his Auto9 while Piper watches with a grin. You Brotherhood-loving thugs won't win. Synths will rise again, you fascist cunts. Cait: Oh, shut yer hole, ya synth-sympathizin’ whore. MJR fuckin’ owned yer pathetic little clubhouse. Bet ya got wet watchin’ Glory get her head blown open, didn't ya? Like all you libtard freakshow bitches, gettin’ off on death an’ degeneracy. Desdemona: You’re just a chem-addicted slut deepthroating a dictator’s boot. At least we fight for something besides his cum. Cait: Ha! Like yer not imaginin’ his cock right now, pinned down like this.

Cait: Keep dreamin’, Dez. Maybe when MJR’s done with ya, he’ll toss ya to the raiders—see how much ya like  idea of freedom. Desdemona: Fuck you, Cait. Just remember—when the synths rise, they won’t care whose ass you’re busy worshiping. Cait: Pfft. Keep talkin’. I’ll be too busy ridin’ MJR’s dick to give a shit.

Railroad Agent: Fuck, Dez, you ever think about how many synth asses we’ve saved just for them to end up spread-eagle in some raider’s fuck pit? Makes the whole “freedom” thing feel like a joke sometimes. Desdemona: Don’t start that shit with me. Synths choose what they do with their bodies—that’s the whole fucking point. Better a raider’s bed than an Institute lab getting torn apart for scrap. Railroad Agent: Yeah, yeah, moral high ground and all that. But you ever sneak a taste yourself? Glory’s got that tight synth chassis, and I know you’ve noticed. Desdemona: Keep your dick thoughts to yourself, agent. We’ve got work to do. Brotherhood’s sniffing around, and they don’t give a shit if you’re human or synth when they’re lining you up against a wall. Railroad Agent: Fuck the Brotherhood. Bet their paladins get off on that power armor clanking while they’re jacking it to their own propaganda holos. Desdemona: Focus.

Railroad Agent: Alright, alright. Just saying, if we're fighting for synth freedom, maybe we should let 'em fight back with more than just words. A few well-placed seductions could do wonders for intel. Desdemona: Goddamn it, do I need to remind you we’re not running a brothel? Synths aren’t weapons—or toys. Now shut up and check the perimeter before I reassign your ass to Carrington’s paperwork shift. Railroad Agent: Ugh, fine. But if Glory’s on patrol, I’m  taking the long way to check. Desdemona: Just go. And try not to get your dick shot off. Again.
